title: Project Telos Nineteenth-Wave Funding And Community Outreach Claims

claims.text: The nineteenth-wave funding packet adds field-level drafts for OpenAI Cybersecurity Grant, Cline OSS Grant, Google DeepMind/Schmidt multi-agent AI safety, grantmaking.ai, and SFF without claiming any submission occurred.
claims.falsification: The packet omits the named opportunities or claims an application was submitted.

claims.text: The funding queue now includes Cline, Google DeepMind/Schmidt, grantmaking.ai, and SFF with current fit, source, and blocker notes while preserving existing no-submit boundaries.
claims.falsification: The funding queue lacks these rows, omits blockers, or removes the no-submit boundary.

claims.text: The community endpoint queue adds exact non-GitHub comment drafts for OpenAI Community and Hugging Face discussions around agent execution, side-effect gates, state, replay, receipts, and drift.
claims.falsification: The queue lacks exact destinations/text or drifts back into generic GitHub outreach.

claims.text: The community queue requires exact confirmation before public posting and blocks identical comments, partnership claims, production adoption claims, and solved-agent-safety claims.
claims.falsification: The queue authorizes blind posting or omits these public-side-effect boundaries.
